behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the subcommand 'reply-and-resolve-thread', the usage message format, the REST endpoint pattern '/pulls/.*/(comments|replies)', the GraphQL mutation to avoid 'addPullRequestReviewThreadReply', the functions replyToThread/generateThreadMd, and the skill/workflow files.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what should change (use REST, add subcommand, update docs) without specifying exact code lines or implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior and regex patterns flexible enough to allow alternative implementations (e.g., any REST endpoint matching /pulls/.*/(comments|replies)).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke node subprocess to exercise CLI behavior (e.g., test_reply_and_resolve_subcommand_no_args) as well as source inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require actual subcommand implementation that exits non-zero with proper usage message; a stub cannot satisfy these plus the source-inspection tests for REST endpoint.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All four instruction requirements (subcommand, REST refactor, generateThreadMd update, skill docs) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped under commented sections (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, agent_config) with descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task doesn't produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, commands, and identifiers are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to relevant files/functions but doesn't name buggy lines; localization of changes is the task.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch to SKILL.md and workflow.md adds localized sections without rewriting the files.
